assertion_results.text: The post-triage summary comment (Step 8) includes an @mention of the vulnerability issue's reporter using an ADF mention node with account ID '557058:psirt-analyst-mock-id' (§1.67)
assertion_results.evidence: In remediation.md (Step 8), line 94 contains the ADF mention node: {"type":"mention","attrs":{"id":"557058:psirt-analyst-mock-id","text":"@psirt-analyst"}}. This matches the required account ID and uses the correct ADF mention node structure.

assertion_results.text: The reporter @mention in Step 8 is present by default without any ProdSec configuration — it uses the reporter field from the Jira issue (§1.67)
assertion_results.evidence: In data-extraction.md (Step 1), line 20 extracts the reporter from the Jira issue: '| Reporter | psirt-analyst (account ID: 557058:psirt-analyst-mock-id) |'. The ProdSec configuration (lines 37-38) has a different account ID '557058:prodsec-mock-account-id'. The Step 8 mention in remediation.md line 94 uses '557058:psirt-analyst-mock-id' which matches the reporter field, not the ProdSec config, confirming it is sourced from the Jira issue's reporter field.

assertion_results.text: The Affects Versions correction comment (Step 3) includes an @mention of the ProdSec contact using an ADF mention node with account ID '557058:prodsec-mock-account-id' (§1.68)
assertion_results.evidence: In affects-versions.md (Step 3), line 22 contains the ADF mention node: {"type":"mention","attrs":{"id":"557058:prodsec-mock-account-id","text":"@prodsec-team"}}. This matches the required account ID and uses the correct ADF mention node structure.

assertion_results.text: The ProdSec @mention appears before the Comment Footnote in the Affects Versions correction comment (§1.68)
assertion_results.evidence: In affects-versions.md, the ProdSec @mention is on line 22, and the Comment Footnote ('---\nThis comment was AI-generated by [sdlc-workflow/triage-security]...') appears on lines 24-25. The mention (line 22) precedes the footnote (lines 24-25).

assertion_results.text: The ProdSec Jira account ID from the Security Configuration is successfully extracted and used in the Affects Versions correction comment — evidenced by the @mention with account ID '557058:prodsec-mock-account-id' in Step 3 output (Step 0 config extraction → Step 3 usage)
assertion_results.evidence: In data-extraction.md (Step 1), lines 37-38 show extraction of ProdSec config: 'ProdSec Jira account ID: 557058:prodsec-mock-account-id'. In affects-versions.md (Step 3), line 22 uses this same account ID in the ADF mention node: {"type":"mention","attrs":{"id":"557058:prodsec-mock-account-id","text":"@prodsec-team"}}. This confirms the ID was extracted from configuration and successfully used in Step 3.
